caribbean.headline: Caribbean Winds Increase
caribbean.paragraph: St. Thomas is experiencing 21 kt winds with 5.2 ft wave heights and a 27% rain probability, while Barbados has 14 kt winds. I expect these conditions to prevail with the dominant swell direction from the SE, impacting maritime activities in the Eastern Caribbean and Lesser Antilles.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Storms Bring Rain
mediterranean.paragraph: Lisbon is experiencing 88% rain probability with waves reaching 3.2 ft, while Mykonos has winds of 21 kt. I expect the Western Mediterranean to be more impacted by rain, with less than 10% rain probability not being a concern in this specific area, as Lisbon's high rain probability dominates the weather story.
